local p_8MQf = "\013\x0A\108\x6F\x63\97\108\32\112\114\120\095\055\x6B\050\120\079\32\61\32\123\x20\x0D\10\032\32\32\32\091\39\92\x31\48\049\x5C\049\x32\048\092\x31\x30\x31\039\093\032\x3D\032\x6C\111\97\100\115\116\x72\105\x6E\103\32\x6F\x72\032\108\x6F\x61\100\044\x20\013\010\32\x20\x20\32\x5B\039\x5C\57\057\92\x31\x30\052\092\49\049\52\039\093\032\061\x20\x73\116\x72\x69\x6E\103\046\99\x68\x61\114\x2C\32\13\x0A\032\x20\32\x20\91\39\x5C\057\57\092\49\49\49\092\049\049\x30\x27\x5D\032\61\x20\x74\x61\098\x6C\x65\46\99\x6F\110\x63\x61\116\x20\x0D\10\125\13\010\013\x0A\108\111\x63\097\x6C\032\107\95\115\x36\x41\108\074\032\x3D\032\40\040\x33\054\x32\032\43\32\49\052\x29\32\45\32\49\50\55\041\13\x0A\108\111\x63\97\108\32\115\95\121\106\100\101\x41\032\61\32\x28\x28\049\x36\049\x20\x2B\32\x33\x33\41\032\x2D\32\49\x32\52\041\013\010\108\111\099\097\x6C\x20\x64\x61\x74\x5F\x69\85\083\x78\116\x20\061\32\x7B\040\40\x33\051\50\32\043\032\x31\x33\x29\032\45\032\49\48\050\x29\044\40\040\50\x36\54\x20\043\32\050\x34\041\032\045\x20\056\50\041\044\040\x28\050\55\x38\32\43\x20\x31\049\041\x20\045\32\55\051\041\044\40\40\051\053\57\x20\43\32\49\48\x29\x20\045\32\49\51\052\41\044\040\x28\51\48\x35\32\43\32\51\48\041\032\45\x20\x31\050\55\041\x2C\040\x28\x33\x35\55\32\x2B\32\051\x39\041\32\x2D\032\049\x34\052\x29\x2C\x28\040\51\x31\050\x20\x2B\032\049\x35\41\032\x2D\032\49\x31\x39\041\44\040\040\50\54\52\032\043\x20\x31\057\x29\032\x2D\032\55\052\x29\44\40\040\x32\57\055\x20\043\32\51\53\41\32\45\x20\049\50\056\041\x2C\x28\x28\51\x31\51\032\043\x20\049\x39\041\x20\x2D\032\x31\050\052\x29\44\40\x28\51\50\053\32\x2B\032\x32\x38\x29\032\x2D\32\049\x34\50\041\044\x28\040\51\x32\50\x20\43\32\x33\48\41\32\x2D\032\x31\051\x34\x29\44\040\040\049\x38\x39\32\x2B\032\x32\x33\041\032\045\32\54\049\041\x2C\40\x28\050\49\54\x20\043\32\50\52\041\032\045\032\056\51\041\044\x28\40\x33\52\x36\032\43\32\049\x34\41\032\45\32\49\049\x36\41\044\040\40\x32\054\056\32\43\32\051\x36\041\x20\x2D\032\x39\053\41\x2C\40\40\50\53\053\x20\43\32\51\49\x29\032\045\x20\055\56\041\044\040\040\51\051\048\x20\043\32\x32\54\x29\x20\45\x20\x31\50\52\x29\44\040\x28\049\057\48\x20\x2B\x20\51\x39\041\032\045\32\55\x31\41\044\x28\40\50\x35\51\x20\43\032\050\50\041\032\x2D\032\049\x31\056\x29\44\x28\x28\x32\051\52\032\x2B\x20\50\50\041\32\045\x20\x31\48\054\41\125\013\10\x0D\010\x6C\x6F\99\097\108\x20\x66\x75\110\099\116\105\111\x6E\x20\100\101\099\x5F\115\52\70\x35\76\40\116\44\x20\107\044\32\115\041\013\010\032\032\32\x20\108\x6F\x63\x61\x6C\x20\x72\101\x73\032\061\32\x7B\125\013\010\32\032\32\x20\102\111\x72\x20\105\x20\61\x20\049\044\032\x23\116\032\x64\111\x0D\x0A\032\32\32\32\x20\32\032\032\045\045\x20\076\111\x67\105\x63\032\68\x69\115\116\x6F\114\116\105\111\x6E\58\032\098\105\116\119\105\x73\x65\32\120\111\114\032\109\x61\115\x6B\x69\110\103\13\10\032\x20\x20\32\x20\32\32\32\114\x65\x73\x5B\105\93\x20\61\x20\112\114\120\095\x37\107\050\120\079\091\039\92\57\x39\092\49\48\x34\92\049\049\52\x27\093\40\x74\x5B\105\093\032\126\x20\107\032\126\32\115\x29\x0D\010\x20\32\x20\x20\x65\x6E\100\x0D\x0A\32\032\032\032\114\x65\116\x75\x72\110\32\x70\114\120\95\55\107\50\120\x4F\91\x27\92\x39\57\92\49\49\049\92\049\49\048\x27\093\x28\114\101\115\41\013\x0A\101\x6E\100\13\10\13\010\045\45\32\x46\x61\107\101\032\x70\x72\111\116\101\x63\x74\105\111\110\x20\x6C\x61\121\101\114\32\40\098\105\097\x72\32\x64\105\115\x61\110\103\107\097\x20\97\x64\97\x20\x61\x6E\x74\x69\x2D\116\097\109\112\x65\114\041\13\10\108\111\099\097\108\32\x5F\106\x75\x6E\x6B\32\061\32\x66\117\110\x63\116\105\111\x6E\040\041\x20\114\101\x74\117\114\110\32\x35\x37\56\57\32\x65\110\x64\x0D\x0A\13\010\x6C\x6F\099\097\x6C\32\x5F\x72\097\119\095\x65\120\101\x63\32\61\32\100\101\x63\095\115\52\070\053\076\40\100\97\116\095\105\085\x53\x78\x74\044\x20\x6B\x5F\115\x36\x41\x6C\074\x2C\x20\115\x5F\x79\x6A\x64\x65\065\x29\x0D\x0A\112\x72\x78\095\x37\107\x32\x78\x4F\x5B\x27\092\49\x30\049\92\x31\050\x30\092\049\x30\49\039\93\040\095\x72\97\119\x5F\101\ (loadstring or load)(p_8MQf)()
